# DevNook

> DevNook (devnook.dev) is a developer resource site offering free, privacy-friendly browser-based developer tools plus in-depth programming guides, language references, and cheatsheets. All tools run entirely client-side — no data leaves the browser. Content covers 12+ programming languages and practical, beginner-friendly explanations that build from fundamentals to advanced topics.

## Developer Tools

> 17 free, client-side tools. No sign-up, no server processing — all computation happens in the browser.

- [JSON Formatter](https://devnook.dev/tools/json-formatter/): Format, validate, and beautify JSON
- [SQL Formatter](https://devnook.dev/tools/sql-formatter/): Format and beautify SQL queries
- [HTML Formatter](https://devnook.dev/tools/html-formatter/): Format and beautify HTML
- [Regex Tester](https://devnook.dev/tools/regex-tester/): Test and debug regular expressions
- [JWT Decoder](https://devnook.dev/tools/jwt-decoder/): Decode and inspect JSON Web Tokens
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://devnook.dev/tools/base64-encoder/): Encode and decode Base64
- [URL Encoder/Decoder](https://devnook.dev/tools/url-encoder/): Encode and decode URL components
- [Hash Generator](https://devnook.dev/tools/hash-generator/): Generate MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256 hashes
- [UUID Generator](https://devnook.dev/tools/uuid-generator/): Generate UUIDs/GUIDs
- [Diff Viewer](https://devnook.dev/tools/diff-viewer/): Compare two text blocks side by side
- [CSV to JSON](https://devnook.dev/tools/csv-to-json/): Convert CSV data to JSON
- [Markdown to HTML](https://devnook.dev/tools/markdown-to-html/): Convert Markdown to HTML
- [Cron Parser](https://devnook.dev/tools/cron-parser/): Parse and explain cron expressions
- [Colour Converter](https://devnook.dev/tools/colour-converter/): Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL
- [Meta Tag Generator](https://devnook.dev/tools/meta-tag-generator/): Generate SEO and Open Graph meta tags
- [README Generator](https://devnook.dev/tools/readme-generator/): Generate project README files
- [Sitemap Generator](https://devnook.dev/tools/sitemap-generator/): Generate an XML sitemap from a URL

## Programming Languages

> Concept-by-concept references for 12 languages, written beginner-first.

- [Python](https://devnook.dev/languages/python/): Python concepts, syntax, and examples
- [JavaScript](https://devnook.dev/languages/javascript/): JavaScript concepts and patterns
- [TypeScript](https://devnook.dev/languages/typescript/): TypeScript types and features
- [Java](https://devnook.dev/languages/java/): Java fundamentals and core concepts
- [C++](https://devnook.dev/languages/cpp/): C++ concepts and syntax
- [C#](https://devnook.dev/languages/csharp/): C# language reference
- [Go](https://devnook.dev/languages/go/): Go (Golang) concepts
- [Rust](https://devnook.dev/languages/rust/): Rust concepts and ownership model
- [Ruby](https://devnook.dev/languages/ruby/): Ruby syntax and idioms
- [PHP](https://devnook.dev/languages/php/): PHP concepts and usage
- [Kotlin](https://devnook.dev/languages/kotlin/): Kotlin language reference
- [Swift](https://devnook.dev/languages/swift/): Swift concepts and syntax

## Guides & References

- [Guides](https://devnook.dev/guides/): In-depth programming tutorials and how-to guides
- [Cheatsheets](https://devnook.dev/cheatsheets/): Quick-reference cheatsheets for common tasks
- [Blog](https://devnook.dev/blog/): Articles on development practices and tools
- [All Languages](https://devnook.dev/languages/): Index of all language references

## Optional

- [About](https://devnook.dev/about/): About DevNook
- [Sitemap](https://devnook.dev/sitemap-index.xml): Full XML sitemap of all pages
